text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Our visit to the shrine went perfectly!
Thank you for accompanying me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now my poor condition should recover
before—huh?

Sh-she's not the only one! I can draw a great
fortune slip in one pull too!

I'll show her! I won't lose, even when it comes to
luck!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Good day. ♪ Are you trying to draw a great
fortune slip?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: K-Kawakami?! How much did you hear just now?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I-it's not what you think! I'm not trying to
compete with her or anything!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Don't be like that. ♪ You should aim for the top
in everything you do! Which means shooting for
great fortune too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll support you with my One Hundred Princess
Prayers!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I remember seeing that on Princess Fighter
when I was little. The princess visited the shrine a
hundred times to support her friend...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But... are you actually going to do that all for
me?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ I've been training every day, so all that
running should be a breeze!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Rrraaaghhh! One! Two! Threeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess begins sprinting back and
forth between the torii gate and main shrine. ...It
looks like a shuttle run in gym class.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, Kawakami... She's really going all out!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, seeing her strength is always so
encouraging... I need to work hard too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... Ninety-nine! One hundred! All right!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I pray that Scarlet draws a great fortune sliiiip!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Scarlet! What did you get?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...It says "Great Fortune"! I got it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: OH YEAAAH! I knew it! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, thank you so much! This is thanks to the
courage you've given me, Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, no, you're the one who drew the fortune! I did
nothing more than give a little push. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Scarlet's smile brings delight to Kawakami
Princess. It seems she's completely recovered
from her poor condition!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Y-you won't believe this, but... the fortune slip
box was completely empty!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
How can that be?! That means I wasn't able to
help you at all!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! Seeing you run has inspired me,
Kawakami! I'll come back another time and draw a
great fortune slip by my own effort!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Scarlet...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Urghhh... She's such a wonderful Umamusume. I
really wanted to give her a boost of confidence...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess becomes downhearted, and
her condition doesn't appear to have improved...
